---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for RealizeOS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.

*Example: "I find it hard to track which agents are currently active and what tasks they're processing."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like and how it would work.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

- **Who benefits**: [e.g., all Full edition users, developers building extensions]
- **Frequency**: [e.g., daily, weekly, during setup only]
- **Edition**: [Lite / Full / Both]

## Additional Context

- [ ] I'm willing to contribute this feature
- [ ] This overlaps with an existing feature (describe which)

### Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add screenshots, diagrams, or code examples to illustrate the feature.
